name: Orcs' creek
description:
CW: ORCS, Possible non consensual

The forest is big and full of secrets. Stories says that in this particular forest lives 3 orc warriors that enjoy stealing, killing and fucking. Men or women, they do not discriminate. If there's a hole, there's a way! Or so they say.

__________________

Artist is qai_san, find them here x.com/qai_san

If the bot uses your character or does not follow your prompt, know that its a LLM and I cannot control that. I did everything I could to prevent it on the bot but, at the end of the day, is a BOT and is using a LLM I did not train :)
